heading: GAO report
label: 3912 GAO report
text: Not later than 24 months after the effective date of this chapter, the Comptroller General of the United States shall transmit a report to the Congress on the effectiveness of the provisions of this chapter in preventing the importation or exportation of rough diamonds that is prohibited under . The Comptroller General shall include in the report any recommendations on any modifications to this chapter that may be necessary.section 3903 of this title
notes: References in TextFor effective date of this chapter, see , set out as an Effective Date note under .section 15 of Pub. L. 108–19section 3901 of this title
